PreCommitTypeSignalsInteractor.docs: Existing interactor implementing PreCommitTypeSignalsService. Referenced for continuity.

CatalogueImplSignalsInteractor.docs: Interactor implementing CatalogueImplSignalsService. Orchestrates per-layer A/B/C TypeGraph fetch, signal evaluator invocation, and region-by-region result formatting. Injected dependencies: CatalogueDocumentLoaderPort (A-side catalogue file load), CatalogueToExtendedCratePort (A-side CatalogueDocument → ExtendedCrate conversion), SignalEvaluatorPort (Phase 1 + Phase 2 evaluation), RustdocCratePort (B-side baseline load via load_from_path; C-side live capture via capture_current), TdddLayerBindingsPort (architecture-rules.json enumeration). apps/cli constructs the concrete infrastructure adapters (FsCatalogueDocumentLoader, CatalogueToExtendedCrateCodec, SignalEvaluatorV2, RustdocCrateAdapter, FsTdddLayerBindingsAdapter) and injects them at the composition root. [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

CatalogueImplSignalsError.docs: Error type for CatalogueImplSignalsService::run. Variants: InvalidTrackId (track id format invalid), LayerBindingsLoad (loading TDDD layer bindings from architecture-rules.json failed; covers both file-read/parse failure and requested layer not found or not tddd.enabled), CatalogueLoad (A-side catalogue document read/decode failure), BaselineLoad (B-side baseline rustdoc load failure), ExtendedCrateConversion (A-side CatalogueDocument → ExtendedCrate conversion failure), SchemaExport (C-side live capture failure), Evaluation (signal evaluator failure), SymlinkRejected (path traversal or symlink guard rejection from the security validation in the interactor), NoLayers (no TDDD-enabled layers found or resolved). [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

RenderContractMapCommand.docs: Command input for RenderContractMap::execute. Modified: removed stale kind_filter field (baseline was captured before T003 removed it); current shape is 2 fields (track_id, layer_filter).

RenderContractMapError.docs: Error variants for RenderContractMap::execute. Modified: removed stale UnknownKindFilter variant (baseline was captured before T003 removed it); corrected variant payloads to match actual enum (tuple and struct variants, not unit). thiserror #[from] generates From<CatalogueLoaderError> and From<ContractMapWriterError>; declared with explicit generic_args to disambiguate the two impls. Also Display/Error for thiserror-generated impls.

CatalogueImplSignalsService.docs: Application service (driving port) for the `bin/sotp track catalogue-impl-signals` use case. Returns a formatted markdown string with per-layer 11-region signal table for stdout output. The layer parameter optionally filters to a single layer; None means all TDDD-enabled layers. [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

TrackBlobReader.docs: IN-23/IN-20/IN-22: TrackBlobReader trait is modified in three steps. (1) T021 DONE: read_type_signals (returning BlobFetchResult<TypeSignalsDocument>) added with a default implementation (BlobFetchResult::FetchError) so existing test mocks compile without change. GitShowTrackBlobReader::read_type_signals is now implemented (reads <layer>-type-signals.json from git blob, decodes via type_signals_codec). (2) T022 DONE: read_type_catalogue return type changed from BlobFetchResult<(TypeCatalogueDocument, String)> to BlobFetchResult<(Vec<u8>, String)> (raw catalogue bytes + pre-computed declaration_hash). Stage 2 of check_strict_merge_gate uses the hash for the freshness check only; catalogue decoding in the usecase layer is no longer needed. (3) T024 changes read_catalogue_for_spec_ref_check from BlobFetchResult<(TypeCatalogueDocument, String)> to BlobFetchResult<(CatalogueDocument, String)> — migrating the chain-② merge-gate port to v3-native CatalogueDocument (consistent with IN-22's v3-native requirement for all TypeCatalogueDocument consumers). Only the three modified/added methods are declared here; unchanged methods (read_spec_document, read_impl_plan, read_enabled_layers, read_catalogue_spec_signals_document) are pre-existing and not tracked in this entry.

CatalogueSpecSignalsWriter.docs: Existing secondary_port for persisting catalogue-spec signal documents. Referenced to expose implements edge for FsCatalogueSpecSignalsStore.

PreCommitTypeSignalsService.docs: Existing application_service trait for running pre-commit type signal checks. Referenced for continuity.

SchemaExporterPort.docs: Existing secondary_port for exporting crate schema as JSON string. Referenced to expose implements edge for RustdocSchemaExporter.

SpecElementHashReader.docs: Secondary port for reading per-element SHA-256 digests from spec.json on a remote git ref (usecase::catalogue_spec_refs). Referenced to expose the GitShowTrackBlobReader -.impl.-> SpecElementHashReader edge in the contract map. Pre-existing baseline port, not modified in this track. BlobFetchResult is parameterised with the concrete BTreeMap return type (R8 full-generic declaration).

usecase::merge_gate::check_strict_merge_.docs: IN-23/IN-20/IN-22: check_strict_merge_gate is modified in two steps. (1) T022 DONE (IN-23): Stage 2 was updated to read <layer>-type-signals.json via TrackBlobReader::read_type_signals (returning TypeSignalsDocument) instead of reading TypeCatalogueDocument and re-evaluating signals. The decoded TypeSignalsDocument is passed directly to check_type_signals (which now takes &TypeSignalsDocument). The declaration_hash freshness check reads catalogue bytes via read_type_catalogue and compares against signals_doc.declaration_hash (fail-closed if absent or mismatched). (2) T024/IN-22 (pending): Stage 3 will be migrated from read_catalogue_for_spec_ref_check returning BlobFetchResult<(TypeCatalogueDocument, String)> to the same port returning BlobFetchResult<(CatalogueDocument, String)>; Stage 3 call-sites for check_catalogue_spec_ref_integrity and check_catalogue_spec_signals will be replaced with inline equivalent logic consuming CatalogueDocument directly. Actual return type is VerifyOutcome (domain::verify, not re-exported at domain root) and params include a generic R bound — both are not resolvable by the signal evaluator. Simplified declaration uses 'bool' placeholder for returns to avoid UnresolvedTypeRef; actual signature verification deferred to implementation phase.
